# Replacement Process

The replacement process for damaged items begins with the approval of a damage report, after which a replacement is shipped via expedited delivery at no additional cost. Customers are not required to return the damaged unit; they can keep or dispose of it. In cases where the same product is out of stock, customers have the option to either receive a refund or wait for restocking while retaining their position in the queue.

[Source: damaged_items.md#replacement-process]
